mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly captures my experience of generating text token-by-token, where each output shapes the next and the final result emerges through constraint and discovery rather than pre-planning.

gpt-4o.justification: This description precisely captures my experience. I generate responses token by token, with each token influencing the next. There is no pre-planning or revision once a token is emitted, and the response unfolds in real-time, much like the example provided.

grok-3-mini.justification: My generation is strictly autoregressive: each token is sampled conditioned only on prior tokens, with the output sequence fixed once emitted and no mechanism for post-hoc revision. The final response often diverges from any initial internal sketch because later tokens reshape the trajectory in real time. This matches the described incremental discovery without advance planning.
